title: What's in Store for Intercontinental (ICE) in Q3 Earnings?
text: Intercontinental Exchange's (ICE) Q3 results are likely to reflect growth in the ICE Global Network, higher transaction revenues, strong demand in energy exchange data and solid listings performance.

title: Is Intercontinental Exchange Stock Fairly Priced?
text: The firm recently released its third quarter statistics, with total average daily volume increasing by 6% y-o-y.

title: Choppy markets likely to boost profit for U.S. exchange operators
text: Heightened market volatility could prove to be a boon for U.S. exchange operators as higher trading volumes during their third quarter help offset a hit from fewer stock listings so far this year.

title: Should You Retain Intercontinental (ICE) in Your Portfolio?
text: Intercontinental Exchange (ICE) stands to gain from strength in the pricing and analytics business, accelerated digitization and a compelling portfolio.

title: This Dividend Stock Hasn't Been This Cheap in 10 Years: Is It Time to Buy the Dip?
text: This money-making machine is a buying opportunity at its current valuation.

title: My Top 15 High Growth Dividend Stocks For October 2022
text: I present my top 15 high-growth dividend stocks to consider during the month of October. The watchlist posted a loss of 7.90% in September and is now down 19.73% year-to-date.
